title: LlamaCppRuntime adapter scaffolding (llama-cpp-2 wrapper module)
goal: Create the LlamaCppRuntime adapter module structure: the public adapter struct, llama-cpp-2 dependency wiring, and a no-op-but-typed ModelRuntime impl that delegates to llama_cpp_2 backend calls (load/unload only first; generate/score/embed stubbed with NotImplemented). Subsequent MTs (MT-073..MT-080) fill in real implementations.
expected_diff_shape: New directory src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/llama_cpp/ with mod.rs, adapter.rs (LlamaCppRuntime struct + ModelRuntime impl skeleton), context.rs (llama-cpp-2 context wrapping), gguf_loader.rs (load implementation only).
implementation_notes: Per AC-LLAMACPP-ADAPTER (spec §4.6.2): LlamaCppRuntime (DEFAULT) wraps llama-cpp-2 Rust crate; covers ~all GGUF transformer models; required path for KV-cache + KV-quant + self-speculative decoding (§4.7.1g). LlamaCppRuntime struct: `pub struct LlamaCppRuntime { models: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<ModelId, LlamaModelHandle>>>, default_kv_policy: KvCachePolicy, ledger: Arc<ProcessLedgerIntegration> }`. LlamaModelHandle wraps `llama_cpp_2::LlamaModel` + `llama_cpp_2::LlamaContext` + per-model state (LoraStack, KvCacheStats). All llama_cpp_2::* identifiers MUST stay inside this module — public surface uses ModelRuntime trait types only. impl ModelRuntime for LlamaCppRuntime: `async fn load(&mut self, spec: LoadSpec) -> Result<ModelId, ModelRuntimeError>` — verify RuntimeKind == LlamaCpp; verify spec.declared_capabilities.supports_activation_steering == false (LlamaCpp has no hook substrate); compute sha256 of artifact and compare to spec.sha256_expected (ERR LoadError if mismatch); spawn llama_cpp_2 backend (initial CPU; GPU via cuda feature flag if available); mint ModelId via now_v7(); register process with process_ledger; insert into models map. `async fn unload(&mut self, id) -> Result<(), ...>` — drop LlamaModel, mark ledger row terminated, remove from map. generate/score/embed/kv_cache/lora_stack/steering_hooks return placeholder errors NotImplemented (filled in MT-073..MT-080). capabilities returns the declared capabilities from registration. cancel sets a per-context cancel flag. Per spec §3.6.2 model-process spawn MUST go through SandboxAdapter — for llama-cpp-2 in-process, this means the entire handshake_core process is the sandbox boundary (operator-set: in-proc OR llama.cpp server subprocess inside SandboxAdapter). MT-073 picks the spawn mode. UUID v7 for ModelId per HBR-INT-008.
risk_if_missed: Subsequent llama-cpp-2 MTs lack a module to extend; engine-specific types leak via fragmented re-implementations.
validator_focus: llama_cpp_2::* identifiers contained inside model_runtime/llama_cpp/**; sha256 mismatch returns LoadError; ModelId uses now_v7(); capability declaration rejects activation_steering=true on this adapter.

minimum_controls: Grep enforcement: llama_cpp_2:: only inside model_runtime/llama_cpp/**.
Capability rejection at load (activation_steering=true on LlamaCpp).
sha256 mismatch returns explicit error before adapter accepts the artifact.
